specific_mechanism: ELLIP-ADV: elliptic-curve-mod-p signature for LLM output integrity in adversarial training
llm_application: During RLHF adversarial coevolution, sign each model output via elliptic-curve hash; verify reward-model signatures from teacher; detect tampering.
novelty_claim: Distinct from R685, R699, R713 adversarial-coevolution.
